name: MYOS | PRE-CORRUPTED | SHADOW MILK COOKIE
description:
Make your own scenario! рҹҹҰ

Another MYOS bot for today! Nothing much to say here, I'm just gonna show you my headcanoned pre-corrupted names for beasts because I put them in desc and I get that some ppl get confused later:

Mystic Flour -> Pale Flour

Burning Spice -> Tempered Spice (don't bully me for that, it's just a headcanon, I won't change it unless you give me a better one)

Eternal Sugar -> Joyous Sugar (just like the previous one, will change only if I find something better)

And Silent Salt is the same bc I don't like headcanoning characters I don't know much about ВҜвҒ \вҒ _вҒ (вҒ гғ„вҒ )вҒ _вҒ /вҒ ВҜ

Don't like them? Don't chat. Don't bully me for having headcanons. If you have better ideas of their names just type them in respectfully, I don't need a reminder how stupid my headcanons are.

Lemme copy and paste message from other MYOS I posted today... :

I have plans of posting OC or canon character from To Be Hero X universe, this dongua is my new obsession I love it AAAAAAAA Lin Ling my beloved (вҒ  вҒ ЛҳвҒ  вҒ ВівҒ ЛҳвҒ )вҒ вҷҘ also Nice my beloved (вҒ  вҒ ЛҳвҒ  вҒ ВівҒ ЛҳвҒ )вҒ вҷҘ (can't decide which one to love, I adore both cinnamonrolls and mentally unstable bitches)

Also I think I'm gonna put a request bot somewhere to just have all requests in one place (вҒ пҪЎвҒ вҖўМҒвҒ пёҝвҒ вҖўМҖвҒ пҪЎвҒ ) because I'm pretty sure I missed some from the comments

Have fun with this one!
creator: BeeIsHeree
